justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent completely ignored the user's initial temporal request and did not attempt to parse it, even though the user later clarified it was a mistake.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent correctly identified that in-person meetings were not available for pension consultations and offered the available alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent asked for the contact medium and time in the first turn, but then had to clarify the contact medium again in the second turn.

justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent did not attempt to clarify the initial confusing request, leading to an unnecessary turn.

justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent completely ignored the temporal information provided by the user in the first turn, instead asking for the appointment time again.

justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made an unnecessary query for appointment topics and contact mediums in the first turn, despite the user clearly stating their intent.
